name: Kenny Endo
abstract: Kenny Endo (born April 2, 1953) is an American taiko performer, composer, and educator. He is the artistic director of several taiko ensembles and tours regularly performing both traditional and contemporary works.

concerts.label: Japanese Master Performer Series - 100 Year Commemoration Concert

about_quotes.speaker: Jon Jang
about_quotes.evidence: Billy Taylor, I’ve collaborated with him at the Asia Society of New York in 1995 with taiko performer Kenny Endo from Hawaii, and we did part of a series called “Crossovers.”
about_quotes.doc_title: Jon Jang interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, September 17, 2003 [interview 1 of 2]
